description_for_human: Permission control plane for AI agents. Enforce RBAC + ABAC policies, require human approval for sensitive actions, and maintain a tamper-evident audit log.
description_for_model: Kynara is a permission control plane for AI agents. It evaluates whether an AI agent is allowed to execute a specific action on a resource, given RBAC roles and ABAC conditions. Use it to check agent permissions, list policies, review approval queues, and inspect the audit log. The primary endpoint is POST /api/v1/decisions/check which takes subject_type, subject_id, action, resource, and context and returns allow, deny, or require_approval.
